title: Fast & Fine
description: Improves performance and adds quality life features.
body:
# Fast & Fine | [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/fast-fine)
A lightweight modpack focused on optimization and quality of life, bringing performance improvements and small additions that make the game more fluid, beautiful, and practical — without losing Minecraft's original style. Ideal for those who want to play with higher FPS and comfort while maintaining the enhanced vanilla experience.

**Only the most recent versions will be updated.**

## Credits
**All credits reserved to the mod creators.**

_If you use this modpack in videos, servers or any other public project, please give due credit mentioning the name of the modpack and its creator._ Also, **we don't pretend to make any profit** from this modpack.

## Mods from the most recent version:
- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers)
- [Accurated Block Placement Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/accurate-block-placement-reborn)
